description: Create a GitLab CI configuration that defines a collection of top‑level variables matching a Hexo blog setup (archive_dir, author, category_dir, code_dir, date_format, default_category, default_layout, deploy, etc.). No image, services, stages, or jobs are specified, so the pipeline contains no executable steps. These variables will be available to any future jobs that reference them. The configuration does not include caches, artifacts, rules, or deployment targets.
